testcase.name: test_aadhaar_auto_extraction

failure.message:
AssertionError: Aadhaar not auto-extracted into DOCX. Text sample: CHARGE-SHEET (UNDER SECTION 193 BNSS.)
IN THE COURT OF JUDICIAL FIRST CLASS MAGISTRATE AT AADTEST PS
14. Brief facts of the case: (To be filled. Use the Narration Generator or write here.) 15. Investigation done so far: (To be filled.) 16. Result of investigation: The case is found to be true. The accused is/are charge-sheeted. Hence charge sheet. 17. Is ack. Copy of notice to complainant enclosed: -- 18. Dispatched on: _____ Signature of the Investigation officer Submitting charge-sheet. Name: _____ Rank: _____, of PS AadTest PS 1. Dist.:- TestDist Police Station: AadTest PS assert ('1234 5678 9012' in "CHARGE-SHEET
(UNDER SECTION 193 BNSS.)

IN THE COURT OF JUDICIAL FIRST CLASS MAGISTRATE
AT AADTEST PS



14. Brief facts of the case:
(To be filled. Use the Narration Generator or write here.)
15. Investigation done so far:
(To be filled.)
16. Result of investigation:
The case is found to be true. The accused is/are charge-sheeted.
Hence charge sheet.
17. Is ack. Copy of notice to complainant enclosed: --
18. Dispatched on: _____
Signature of the Investigation officer
Submitting charge-sheet.
Name: _____
Rank: _____, of PS AadTest PS
1. Dist.:- TestDist Police Station: AadTest PS FIR. No: AAD/1/2026 Dated: _____
2. Final Report/Charge Sheet No.
_____
3. Date
05-05-2026
4. Act/Sections.
BNS 115(2)
5. Type of Final form (charge Sheet/Untraced/not Charge sheeted for want of Evidence/Offence abated/Un occurred)
Charge sheet
6. F.R. Un occurred (False/Mistake of fact/Mistake of Law/Non cognizable/Civil Nature)
---
7. If Charge sheet (Original/supplementary)
Original
8. Names of the investigating officers
Sri. _____, SI of Police PS AadTest PS (IO & Filed Charge sheet)
9. Name of the complaint informant with father's/Husband's name.
Sri. _____, S/o _____, Age: _____ years, Caste: _____, Occ: _____, R/o _____, Ph._____
10. Detail of properties/Articles/Documents Recovered/Seized during investigation and relied upon.
_____
11. Particulars of charge sheeted Person.:-
A1. Sri. Unique Identification Authority of India, S/o _____, Age: DOB 12/05/1989 years, Caste: _____, Occ: _____, R/o S/O Krishna Reddy, Hyderabad, Ph._____
 a) Date of arrest, release, Forwarded to Court.
_____
 b) Particulars of sureties if Released on bail.
--
 c) Previous convictions if any.
--
 d) Particulars of accused Persons absconding.
--
12. Particulars of accused persons not charge sheeted.
--
13. Particulars of the witnesses to be examined:

S.No.
Name and Address
Role
LW-1
Sri. _____, S/o _____, Age: _____ years, Caste: _____, Occ: _____, R/o _____, Ph._____
_____
LW-2
Sri. _____, S/o _____, Age: _____ years, Caste: _____, Occ: _____, R/o _____, Ph._____
_____
LW-3
Sri. _____, S/o _____, Age: _____ years, Caste: _____, Occ: _____, R/o _____, Ph._____
_____" or '123456789012' in "CHARGE-SHEET
(UNDER SECTION 193 BNSS.)

IN THE COURT OF JUDICIAL FIRST CLASS MAGISTRATE
AT AADTEST PS



14. Brief facts of the case:
(To be filled. Use the Narration Generator or write here.)
15. Investigation done so far:
(To be filled.)
16. Result of investigation:
The case is found to be true. The accused is/are charge-sheeted.
Hence charge sheet.
17. Is ack. Copy of notice to complainant enclosed: --
18. Dispatched on: _____
Signature of the Investigation officer
Submitting charge-sheet.
Name: _____
Rank: _____, of PS AadTest PS
1. Dist.:- TestDist Police Station: AadTest PS FIR. No: AAD/1/2026 Dated: _____
2. Final Report/Charge Sheet No.
_____
3. Date
05-05-2026
4. Act/Sections.
BNS 115(2)
5. Type of Final form (charge Sheet/Untraced/not Charge sheeted for want of Evidence/Offence abated/Un occurred)
Charge sheet
6. F.R. Un occurred (False/Mistake of fact/Mistake of Law/Non cognizable/Civil Nature)
---
7. If Charge sheet (Original/supplementary)
Original
8. Names of the investigating officers
Sri. _____, SI of Police PS AadTest PS (IO & Filed Charge sheet)
9. Name of the complaint informant with father's/Husband's name.
Sri. _____, S/o _____, Age: _____ years, Caste: _____, Occ: _____, R/o _____, Ph._____
10. Detail of properties/Articles/Documents Recovered/Seized during investigation and relied upon.
_____
11. Particulars of charge sheeted Person.:-
A1. Sri. Unique Identification Authority of India, S/o _____, Age: DOB 12/05/1989 years, Caste: _____, Occ: _____, R/o S/O Krishna Reddy, Hyderabad, Ph._____
 a) Date of arrest, release, Forwarded to Court.
_____
 b) Particulars of sureties if Released on bail.
--
 c) Previous convictions if any.
--
 d) Particulars of accused Persons absconding.
--
12. Particulars of accused persons not charge sheeted.

S.No.
Name and Address
Role
LW-1
Sri. _____, S/o _____, Age: _____ years, Caste: _____, Occ: _____, R/o _____, Ph._____
_____

_____

testcase.failure:
tests/test_fixed_layout_endpoint.py:206: in test_aadhaar_auto_extraction assert ("1234 5678 9012" in text) or ("123456789012" in text), ( E AssertionError: Aadhaar not auto-extracted into DOCX. Text sample: E CHARGE-SHEET E (UNDER SECTION 193 BNSS.) E E IN THE COURT OF JUDICIAL FIRST CLASS MAGISTRATE E AT AADTEST PS E E E E 14. Brief facts of the case: E (To be filled. Use the Narration Generator or write here.) E 15. Investigation done so far: E (To be filled.) E 16. Result of investigation: E The case is found to be true. The accused is/are charge-sheeted. E Hence charge sheet. E 17. Is ack. Copy of notice to complainant enclosed: -- E 18. Dispatched on: _____ E Signature of the Investigation officer E Submitting charge-sheet. E Name: _____ E Rank: _____, of PS AadTest PS E 1. Dist.:- TestDist Police Station: AadTest PS E assert ('1234 5678 9012' in "CHARGE-SHEET
(UNDER SECTION 193 BNSS.)

IN THE COURT OF JUDICIAL FIRST CLASS MAGISTRATE
AT AADTEST PS
